D2 Vision L5 Evaluate Reference

When Motion Meets Equiluminance

slide the colours toward equal luminance and watch the drifting bars lose their sense of motion

The magnocellular motion system reads luminance, not hue. Strip a moving pattern of its luminance contrast and the motion signal starves, even while colour still alternates.

The red-green grating drifts steadily. Slide the green luminance until the lower luminance-only strip flattens to uniform grey — at that point the motion system sees no moving edges, and the drift seems to stall.
